basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Transportation Engineering with specialization in pavement materials
qualification.details: PhD in Transportation Engineering with specialization in pavement materials

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date within 2l days of the adyertisement: 04-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate position at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The last date to send your application via email for the Research Associate position at IIT Roorkee is 04-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Transportation Engineering with a specialization in pavement materials to be eligible for the Research Associate position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 70,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Research Associate job at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with complete bio-data and attach necessary documents, then send it to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Associate position announced by IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The Research Associate position at IIT Roorkee is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification mention any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for comprehensive information.
